name: job-hunt-skills
description: Practical AI-assisted skills for job hunting — resume customization, cover letters, company research, interview prep, LinkedIn, and proof assets, with built-in checks against LLM hallucinations.

plugins.name: job-hunt-skills
plugins.description: Tailor resumes, cover letters, and interview prep to specific roles and organize your job search. Covers research, applications, interviews, LinkedIn, and proof assets — saved as local markdown you control.
